titleZh: Howard Smith Ltd 诉 Ampol Petroleum Ltd
titleEn: Howard Smith Ltd v Ampol Petroleum Ltd
forumZh: 英国枢密院司法委员会
forumEn: Judicial Committee of the Privy Council
holdingZh: Howard Smith 以敌意收购情境下的增发股份为背景，确立董事行使法定权力必须服务于正当公司目的，而不能仅为改变控制权结果。
holdingEn: Howard Smith established that directors must exercise corporate powers for proper purposes and cannot deploy share issuances simply to alter the outcome of a control contest.
